title: Mediterranean Lamb Casserole
description: A hearty and flavorful casserole perfect for a weeknight dinner. The combination of lamb and Mediterranean spices creates a rich and satisfying dish.

ingredients.name: Mediterranean spices
ingredients.notes: a blend of oregano, thyme, and rosemary

instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the crushed tomatoes, Mediterranean spices, salt, and pepper. Bring the mixture to a simmer.
Transfer the lamb and sauce to a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the lamb is tender and the sauce is bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
